hero-desc: I build the backend systems that make products work - reliable, scalable, ready for production. 7 years of experience, from architecture to delivery. Got a project? Let's talk.
about-p1: By day I work on a large distributed backend - microservices, gRPC, GCP, observability at scale. By night I'm building TutAll, a SaaS platform for tutors, which means I think about systems from both sides: engineering and product.
about-p2: I'm an early adopter of AI-assisted development - I use Claude Code daily and actively promote that workflow across my team. In practice: faster delivery, fewer rabbit holes, better code.
about-p3: If you have a backend challenge that needs senior attention - let's talk. I work best when I can own a problem end-to-end.
card1-desc: Multiple microservices, millions of requests per day, designed for scale.
card2-desc: Faster delivery with Claude Code and AI-assisted development.
card3-desc: P99 latency tracking, distributed tracing across services.
card4-desc: Code quality gates, architecture decisions, mentoring.
avail-note: Open to ongoing contracts as well as one-off projects
tutall-desc: SaaS platform for tutors - lesson management, AI-powered transcription, homework generation, payments. Architected and built end-to-end: Go backend on GCP (Cloud Run, Cloud SQL, Vertex AI), React frontend.
release-bot-desc: Slack bot that automates the entire release process - changelog generation, version tagging, production deploys, team notifications. Replaced a manual workflow that used to take 30+ minutes per release.
api-gateway-desc: Built from scratch as a proxy layer for all external API calls. Identified caching opportunities that significantly reduced response times across dependent services.
observability-desc: Set up the full monitoring stack from zero - distributed tracing, context-aware logging, metrics dashboards. Now the first thing the team reaches for during incidents.
data-pipeline-desc: Identified bottlenecks through traces and metrics in a data processing pipeline. Redesigned for parallel execution - significant throughput improvement.
claude-workflow-desc: Custom Git automation built around Claude Code - pre-commit hooks, branch management, slash commands for PR creation and code review. Daily driver for AI-assisted development.
messaging-desc: Built Instagram and Telegram messaging integrations for LiveChat - webhooks, media handling, OAuth, real-time message delivery. The unglamorous work that makes products talk to each other.
